     The Numbers Business Report

The Banshees of Inisherin (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $10,582,266Details
International Box Office $41,762,458
Worldwide Box Office $52,344,724
Further financial details...

Synopsis

On a remote island off the west coast of Ireland, lifelong friends Pádraic and Colm find themselves at an impasse when Colm unexpectedly puts an end to their friendship. A stunned Pádraic, aided by his sister Siobhán and troubled young islander Dominic, endeavors to repair the relationship, refusing to take no for an answer. But Pádraic’s repeated efforts only strengthen his former friend’s resolve and when Colm delivers a desperate ultimatum, events swiftly escalate, with shocking consequences.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$184,454 (1.7% of total gross)
Legs:5.14 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:20.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/1,205 max. theaters, 6.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,953,159

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 21st, 2022 (Limited) by Searchlight Pictures

  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

On a remote island off the west coast of Ireland, lifelong friends Pádraic and Colm find themselves at an impasse when Colm unexpectedly puts an end to their friendship. A stunned Pádraic, aided by his sister Siobhán and troubled young islander Dominic, endeavors to repair the relationship, refusing to take no for an answer. But Pádraic’s repeated efforts only strengthen his former friend’s resolve and when Colm delivers a desperate ultimatum, events swiftly escalate, with shocking consequences.
